batch_summary.note: S-003: stop-contacting + harassment threat then continues texting, May 4 2025 (ROW-13430). Sev-2 — harassment threat invoked. EP-1078 AI start date. ARC-RF12-002 Signal 2.

messages.text: I'm not doing this. Stop contacting me
Olivia said it was meant to be
If you don't have anything constructive or a solution stop texting me. Otherwise it's harassment and I will file harassment
Looks like the church has a 9:00 service. I just looked it up. She said she'd go to that then she can go with you
I knew they had a 10:30 and 12 but they have an earlier 9 too
She feels left out by you anyways so these instances don't help that feeling
She clutches on to that ring you got her and I feel like it's cause she feels like it's her only constant connection

primary_flags.classification: RF-12 primary Sev-2 — Escalated stop-texting/harassment-framing pattern (ADD-006). Sequence: (1) ROW-13430: 'Stop contacting me'; (2) ROW-13432-13434: Melissa immediately sends 3 more messages; (3) ROW-13436: 'stop texting me... it's harassment and I will file harassment' — explicitly invokes harassment threat while she is actively texting; (4) ROW-13437-13440: Melissa sends 4+ more messages on parenting topics. The harassment threat escalates this to Sev-2: Melissa is building a record she could use to accuse Eli of harassment while she herself continues the exchange. This is EP-1078 date (AI-guided communication start): Melissa's response to Eli's new communication pattern. Per ADD-005 and ADD-007. Cross-reference RF-07 (manufactured boundary violation). ARC-RF12-002 Signal 2.
primary_flags.addendum_applied: ADD-006 (stop texting performative — harassment threat while continuing to text). ADD-007 (escalation when calm responses don't work — EP-1078 start date). RF-07 cross-ref for manufactured boundary violation.
